pages.text: You can find this dotted about on berry bushes that emit a slight glow in the suncrown biomes. Eating it restores one hunger bar and has a slight change of giving you glowing, can there for be used to make potions of glowing

A crop you can find in the suncrown biomes. Does not require light to grow but has to be planted on $(l:blocks/suncrown_turf)suncrown turf/$. Eating it restores 3.5 hunger bars and also gives you water breathing, if you want to find out why try using a anagram solver
